channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Simon & Schuster wants to be your favorite content creator
item.description: If you were given $100 and five minutes in a bookstore, which titles would you pick? That’s the premise of Simon & Schuster’s upcoming web series, Bookstore Blitz—the publisher’s latest internet-inspired effort to market its authors. And Bookstore Blitz is just the beginning.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: 11 modi per fallire con l’intelligenza artificiale
item.description: Le aziende stanno investendo molto denaro in strumenti, servizi e strategie che riguardano l’intelligenza artificiale [in inglese]. Purtroppo, però, i grandi esborsi non sempre garantiscono il successo.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: A Venus flytrap wasp? Scientists uncover an ancient insect preserved in amber that snatched its prey
item.description: Scientists have discovered an ancient wasp with a body like a Venus flytrap to seize and snatch its prey.
item.dc:creator: Adithi Ramakrishnan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: US robotics companies push for national strategy, including a central office, to compete with China
item.description: American robotics companies are pushing for a national robotics strategy, including a central government robotics office, to promote the industry at a time that Beijing is making intelligent robots a top national priority.
item.dc:creator: Didi Tang And Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NYT Wins Key Ruling in AI Copyright Lawsuit
item.description: Federal judge allows The New York Times, other newspapers to proceed with copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft over use of their stories to train AI chatbots.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Commercial innovations to drive FedRAMP’s new approach
item.description: Pete Waterman, the director of the cloud security program known as FedRAMP, said four new community working groups will help give industry a bigger voice. The post Commercial innovations to drive FedRAMP’s new approach first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: WWDC 2023: iOS 19 Rumors Intensify - Will Apple's Changes Be Enough?
item.description: Apple's WWDC event marketing has intensified, and rumors suggest iOS 19 will feature a new paint job (user interface changes). But will these tweaks be enough to move the needle on flatlining iPhone sales?
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: This watchdog is tracking how AI firms are quietly backing off their safety pledges
item.description: The companies racing to own the AI future have built their technologies and businesses by carefully keeping track of you and your data.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Snow, Fast Company

item.title: Nissan is back to its bold best with new EV lineup that's led by a third-generation Leaf – and yes, it's an SUV
item.description: Nissan has revealed that it's planning a third-generation Nissan Leaf, along with an electric update of the popular Micra and Juke models for Europe.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Marvel has revealed the full, 27-strong cast for Avengers: Doomsday, and there are plenty of heroes who seemingly won't be part of its roster
item.description: Marvel has revealed who'll be part of Avengers 5's cast - and there are some big hitters missing from its roster.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge colors seemingly revealed in new video, and there’s another sign of an imminent launch
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge has been shown off in black and white shades, and it has passed through the FCC.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: YouTube Premium could be getting a new time-saving perk, showing you recommended videos directly in your playback queue
item.description: YouTube Premium subscribers could be getting another new feature that shows you recommended videos directly in the playback queue.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Critical RCE flaws put Kubernetes clusters at risk of takeover
item.description: The Kubernetes project has released patches for five vulnerabilities in a widely used popular component called the Ingress NGINX Controller that’s used to route external traffic to Kubernetes services. If exploited, the flaw could allow attackers to completely take over entire clusters.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Ethernet roadmap: AI drives high-speed, efficient Ethernet networks
item.description: At next month’s Optical Fiber Communication Conference and Exhibition (OFC), many of the technologies that are driving current and future Ethernet development will be on full display by the Ethernet Alliance, which is set to unveil its tenth anniversary Ethernet roadmap.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Mapfre apuntala su estrategia de IA sobre un manifiesto rector y un nuevo centro global
item.description: Toda una declaración de intenciones. Mapfre presenta en sociedad su nuevo Manifiesto por una inteligencia artificial (IA) humanista, ética y responsable, una hoja de ruta que define una visión y misión claras en torno a una de las tecnologías más disruptivas de los últimos tiempos.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: SAP adoption surges in Europe as enterprises embrace cloud
item.description: Enterprises in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland are accelerating their transition to cloud-based ERP solutions, with SAP playing a key role in their digital transformation strategies.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Tiny electric vehicle takes half a parking space
item.description: Toyota's compact electric FT-Me is designed to tackle challenges of city living while offering an accessible and eco-friendly transportation solution.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 3 steps to get your data AI ready
item.description: While many organizations have already run a small number of successful proofs of concept to demonstrate the value of gen AI, scaling up those PoCs and applying the new technology to other parts of the business will never work until producing AI-ready data becomes standard practice.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Intro to Alpine.js: A JavaScript framework for minimalists
item.description: I recently backpacked through Big Sur, and after a few days, the inevitable happened: I looked at everything I carried and demanded it justify its presence in my backpack. Making tech choices during the software development process is similar.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: What you need to know about Go, Rust, and Zig
item.description: Every language has a life cycle. Sometimes it starts with a relatively narrow use case and escapes its container; sometimes it’s intended as a general-purpose language but finds a powerful niche instead.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Researchers in limbo as Columbia bows to Trump’s demands in bid to restore $400M federal funding
item.description: Researchers at Columbia University remain in limbo after the Ivy League institution bowed to the Trump administration’s demands for unprecedented changes in a bid to restore some $400 million in federal funds cut.
item.dc:creator: Philip Marcelo, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative
item.description: The Trump administration has a '10 out, one in' rule for new regulations, but DoD officials are confident they can finalize the CMMC requirements soon. The post DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Cosmonic uses WebAssembly to manage apps
item.description: Leveraging the WebAssembly binary instruction format, Cosmonic has launched wasmCloud-based Cosmonic Control, an enterprise control plane for managing distributed applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A European startup scrubs its attempt to launch an orbital rocket on its first test flight
item.description: OSLO, Norway (AP) — A private European aerospace company scrubbed its attempt on Monday to launch the first test flight of its orbital launch vehicle from Norway.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Kotlin bolsters K2 compiler plugin support, WebAssembly debugging
item.description: Kotlin 2.1.20, just released as the latest version of JetBrains’ cross-platform programming language, improves both plugin support for the K2 compiler and Kotlin/Wasm debugging. The Kotlin update was announced March 20. Instructions on updating can be found at kotlinlang.org.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Draft EO would make GSA the center of most common buys
item.description: President Donald Trump is expected to sign two executive orders in the coming weeks that seek to reform federal acquisition, including a rewrite of the FAR. The post Draft EO would make GSA the center of most common buys first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Top network and data center events 2025
item.description: Ready to travel to gain hands-on experience with new networking and infrastructure tools? Tech conferences – in person and virtual – give attendees a chance to access product demos, network with peers, earn continuing education credits, and catch a celebrity keynote or live entertainment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Keysight network packet brokers gain AI-powered features
item.description: Network packet broker (NPB) technology has been deployed inside of networks for over a decade. Like just about everything else in the IT and networking stack in 2025, AI is now increasingly becoming a key feature.
item.dc:creator: Network World
